chunks.text: January IRIS Server Patching | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar January IRIS Server Patching Microsoft will release their patches for the month on Tuesday, January 13th, 2026. Various IRIS Windows and Linux

January 13th, 2026. Various IRIS Windows and Linux servers will be patched and rebooted Tuesday, Wednesday, or Thursday. PRINT, WINTERM and WDS will automatically patch and reboot Wednesday, January 14th, at 3:00am. WINTERM may be unavailable until 1

4th, at 3:00am. WINTERM may be unavailable until 10:00am Wednesday, depending on additional software updates. Linux servers lists.eecs, iris2.eecs (for access to the network and roster databases) will be patched and rebooted Wednesday night. DNS serv

be patched and rebooted Wednesday night. DNS servers cronus and themis may also be briefly unavailable while rebooting at approximately 8:00pm Tuesday. On Thursday, January 15th, the departmental DHCP server is scheduled for downtime from about 9am

P server is scheduled for downtime from about 9am to 9:30am (actual downtime is expected to be shorter than scheduled). Linux login servers login.eecs/login-mfa.eecs will also be patched and rebooted around this time. UPDATE [2026-01-15 | larsrohr ]

around this time. UPDATE [2026-01-15 | larsrohr ] Resolved as of 2026-01-15 11:00am Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status Outages to campus services are listed at berkele
s Outages to campus services are listed at berkeley.statusdashboard.com .
